title: Exploration quest (v4)
description: A quest where the player must visit every room listed in required_room_ids. Progress is tracked per player as rooms are entered; the quest auto-completes on the final room visit (there is no QUEST COMPLETE step) and grants gold, XP and an optional title. Schema version 1 is a kill quest, version 2 an item-collection delivery quest, version 3 an NPC-to-NPC package delivery; this version 4 covers room-visitation exploration. Quests are stored as data/quests/quest.<id>.json and the loader tolerates unknown properties.

type.description: Optional human-readable discriminator. The effective type is derived from which fields are populated.

id.description: Unique quest id, accepted via QUEST ACCEPT <id>.

name.description: Display name shown to the player.

description.description: Short flavour description of the exploration goal.

required_room_ids.description: Room ids the player must all visit to complete the quest, in any order. Every id must exist in the room repository; the quest grant fails loudly otherwise.

title_reward.description: Optional title granted to the player on completion.

item_reward.description: Optional item id granted directly to the player's inventory on completion. Must exist under data/items/. Applies to any quest type. Copies that would exceed the player's carry weight drop at their feet in the current room.

item_reward_quantity.description: Number of copies of item_reward to grant. Defaults to 1 when item_reward is present and this field is omitted; must be omitted (or 0) when item_reward is absent.

examples.name: Into the Catacombs
examples.description: Chart every chamber of the Catacombs beneath the keep.
